name: Melt Aways
recipeInstructions:
Preparation time: 20 minutes Baking time: 7 minutes per batch
1. Preheat oven to 450°F (232°C). In a mixing bowl, combine butter, confectioners' sugar, and vanilla.
2. Sift together the cake flour and salt. Gradually stir into the butter mixture until combined.
3. Stir in the chopped pecans.
4. Drop heaping teaspoonfuls of dough onto an ungreased cookie sheet.
5. Bake for 7 minutes or until edges are very light brown. Remove from oven and let cool on a wire rack.
6. With the cookies still warm (but not hot), sift confectioners' sugar over them generously.
